untranslatable_reason: Not a sizing rule. This is a portfolio construction rule (maximum concurrent positions by account size), not a position sizing method. It defines position count limits, not how to calculate position size in dollars/contracts/shares. Sizing methods (R_MULTIPLE, FIXED_FRACTIONAL, VOLATILITY_SCALED, etc.) determine HOW MUCH to risk per trade; this rule determines HOW MANY trades to hold simultaneously.
